channel.title: The Grant Desk - NL
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in tech, art and research, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: NL.

item.title: Call for Proposals: Alex Adriaansens Residency 2026 - deadline 01 Jun 2026 (36 days left)
item.description:
V2_ Lab for the Unstable Media

Location: Rotterdam, Netherlands

Award: €7,500

Duration: 3 months (starts 1 September 2026)

Deadline: 01 Jun 2026 (36 days left)

Residency honouring V2_ co-founder Alex Adriaansens, aimed at upcoming curators, festival/programme initiators, community organisers and cultural practitioners in media art, digital cultures and related fields who are starting their professional careers. Duos or teams may apply (sharing the grant). No thematic requirement; applicants choose their own research focus and have access to V2_'s extensive archive. Apply with a letter of motivation (max 2 pages), short CV (max 1 page) and a specific research question (max 1 page) via the linked Google form, or email v2@v2.nl if you do not have a Google account. A jury of V2_ team members decides. Results will be presented in Rotterdam at a jointly organised event (e.g. expert meeting), or via an essay, or another format proposed by the resident.

Open call details

item.title: Impulse and In-Depth Scheme (I&V) for Rotterdam Visual Artists - deadline 21 Sep 2026 (148 days left)
item.description:
CBK Rotterdam / Art Office

Location: Rotterdam, Netherlands (Rotterdam-based artists only)

Award: Up to €7,500 (time compensation; fee depends on project duration)

Duration: Defined work period or project

Deadline: 21 Sep 2026 (148 days left)

Subsidy supporting in-depth activities or innovative impulses within the artistic practice of Rotterdam-based visual artists, with a clearly defined artistic question or objective. Applicants must be registered with Art Office (artoffice.info) with an up-to-date artist page. The 2026 Round 2 deadline is 21 September 2026, 11:00 (form opens 10 August 2026); results by 16 November 2026. Round 1 (deadline 2 March 2026) has already closed. Decisions made by the director of CBK Rotterdam on advice from an expert committee.

Open call details

item.title: Making Visible the Invisible: Critical Pathways Fellowships 2026 - deadline 1 day left, 27 Apr 2026
item.description:
Critical Pathways community and Towards a Circular Economy and Society, Utrecht University

Location: Utrecht, Netherlands

Award: Up to €10,000 (travel, accommodation, living expenses, visa)

Duration: 4 to 6 weeks (Oct to Nov 2026, dates flexible)

Deadline: 1 day left, 27 Apr 2026

Fellowship for anyone whose work uncovers hidden stories, systems and power structures behind ecological breakdown and inequality, and reimagines fairer alternatives. Open to artists, filmmakers, writers, activists, organisers, journalists, legal practitioners, policy advocates, conservationists, sustainability practitioners, entrepreneurs and academics from any discipline. No PhD required. 2026 theme: Making Visible the Invisible (overlooked consequences of how we live, produce and consume; who bears hidden costs; shifting from extractive to regenerative systems). Apply by sending the form (.docx) plus CV to criticalpathways@uu.nl. Notifications within 6 weeks of deadline.

Open call details

item.title: Mondriaan Fund: Art Commission - deadline Rolling / undated
item.description:
Mondriaan Fund

Location: Netherlands

Award: Funded (see grant page)

Duration: Project-based

Deadline: Rolling / undated

Commission artists to create new work in publicly accessible spaces such as hospitals or museums. Open to individuals and organisations. Continuous deadline.

Open call details

item.title: Mondriaan Fund: Artist Basic - deadline Rolling / undated
item.description:
Mondriaan Fund

Location: Netherlands

Award: Funded (see grant page)

Duration: Variable

Deadline: Rolling / undated

Support for visual artists with 4+ years of experience to expand their portfolio, increase visibility or conduct research. Continuous deadline.

Open call details

item.title: Mondriaan Fund: Artist Project - deadline Rolling / undated
item.description:
Mondriaan Fund

Location: Netherlands or abroad

Award: Funded (see grant page)

Duration: Project-based

Deadline: Rolling / undated

Funding for concrete artistic plans, research projects, or working periods in the Netherlands or abroad. Continuous deadline.

Mondriaan Fund

Award: Funded (see grant page)

Duration: Project-based

Deadline: Rolling / undated

item.title: Mondriaan Fund: Awareness of the History of Slavery - deadline 16 Jul 2026 (81 days left)
item.description:
Mondriaan Fund

Location: Netherlands

Award: Funded (see grant page)

Duration: Project-based

Deadline: 16 Jul 2026 (81 days left)

Support for artistic plans addressing awareness of the history of slavery. Open to individuals and organisations.

Mondriaan Fund

Award: Funded (see grant page)

Duration: Research-period based

Deadline: Rolling / undated

Funding for preliminary research into exhibitions, events, articles or presentations. For curators. Continuous deadline.

Award: Funded (see grant page)
